logs.message: WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'interp' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Design contains AXI ports. Reset is fixed to synchronous and active low.
WARNING: [HLS 207-5551] Invalid function level interface port in '#pragma HLS interface': expect 'return' (Scaler.cpp:28:39)

WARNING: [IP_Flow 19-4832] The IP name 'DriveScale_fpext_32ns_64_1_no_dsp_1_ip' you have specified is long. The Windows operating system has path length limitations. It is recommended you use shorter names to reduce the likelihood of issues.

WARNING: [IP_Flow 19-4832] The IP name 'DriveScale_fmul_32ns_32ns_32_2_max_dsp_1_ip' you have specified is long. The Windows operating system has path length limitations. It is recommended you use shorter names to reduce the likelihood of issues.

WARNING: [IP_Flow 19-4832] The IP name 'DriveScale_fdiv_32ns_32ns_32_6_no_dsp_1_ip' you have specified is long. The Windows operating system has path length limitations. It is recommended you use shorter names to reduce the likelihood of issues.

WARNING: [IP_Flow 19-4832] The IP name 'DriveScale_fcmp_32ns_32ns_1_1_no_dsp_1_ip' you have specified is long. The Windows operating system has path length limitations. It is recommended you use shorter names to reduce the likelihood of issues.

WARNING: [IP_Flow 19-4832] The IP name 'DriveScale_dadd_64ns_64ns_64_3_full_dsp_1_ip' you have specified is long. The Windows operating system has path length limitations. It is recommended you use shorter names to reduce the likelihood of issues.
